name: test_delete_note
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Deleted note still visible
assert 'Database Optimization Plan' not in ['Frontend Design Updates', 'Database Optimization Plan', 'Integration Test Edit', 'Integration Test Note creation', 'Grocery Shopping', 'Meeting with Team']
statusTrace:
browser = <selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver.WebDriver (session="a63d5727aeb2b3bc32fc3defe68ee584")>

    @pytest.mark.ui
    def test_delete_note(browser):
    
        logger.info("Delete Note Test Started")
    
        config = ConfigReader.read_config()
    
        login_page = LoginPage(browser)
        notes_page = NotesPage(browser)
    
        logger.info("Logging into application")
    
        login_page.login(
            config["qa"]["email"],
            config["qa"]["password"]
        )
    
        # Create Note First
        logger.info("Creating note for delete test")
    
        notes_page.create_note(
            category=config["qa"]["ui_del_note"]["ui_del_category"],
            title=config["qa"]["ui_del_note"]["ui_del_title"],
            description=config["qa"]["ui_del_note"]["ui_del_description"]
        )
    
        logger.info("Test note created successfully")
    
        # Delete Note
        logger.info("Deleting created note")
    
        notes_page.delete_note()
    
        notes_page.refresh_page()
    
        all_titles = notes_page.get_all_note_titles()
    
        logger.info(
            f"Remaining Notes: {all_titles}"
        )
    
>       assert (
            config["qa"]["ui_create_note"]["ui_title"]
            not in all_titles
        ), "Deleted note still visible"
E       AssertionError: Deleted note still visible
E       assert 'Database Optimization Plan' not in ['Frontend Design Updates', 'Database Optimization Plan', 'Integration Test Edit', 'Integration Test Note creation', 'Grocery Shopping', 'Meeting with Team']
